message:
fix(syntax): improve number literal, TOML array, and Markdown emphasis parsing

Number literal scanning:
- Support binary (0b) and octal (0o) prefixes alongside hex (0x)
- Parse scientific notation/exponent suffixes (1e10, 1e-5)
- Allow underscores in type suffixes (e.g. u8_le patterns)

Line splitting changed from split('\n') to .lines() to handle \r\n
correctly and avoid trailing empty strings.

TOML tokenizer:
- Brackets on non-first-column lines treated as array delimiters instead
  of table headings, fixing incorrect highlighting of inline arrays
- Close bracket ] now recognized as a delimiter token

Markdown tokenizer:
- Emphasis markers (*, _) now require a matching closing marker before
  classifying as Emphasis; unmatched markers fall back to Text, fixing
  false-positive bold/italic highlighting

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
